transcript: Speaker A: We need someone who speaks English for big presentation. Nobody? Speaker B: I can do it, sir. Speaker A: You? You're just a kid! Speaker B: Sir, I use MySivi app. AI teacher teaches me English in Tamil. Speaker A: Hahaha! Go play, kid. [One week later] Speaker A: Uh... project is... uh... good. Very good. Speaker B: Let me explain our innovative solution with three key benefits. Speaker A: How... how you learned? Speaker B: MySivi app தமிழிலேயே English கத்துக்கலாம். Daily 15 minutes, 30 days-ல fluent good. [With MySivi app, you can learn English in Tamil itself. Daily 15 minutes, fluent in 30 days, good.] Speaker A: I also download. Install now. Speaker B: Even kids can beat adults. தமிழிலேயே கத்துக்க MySivi-ஆ 1 ரூபாய்க்கு trial start பண்ணுங்க. [To learn in Tamil itself, start your MySivi trial for 1 rupee.]

summary: An office boss demands an English speaker for a presentation, causing terrified adult employees to hide. A young boy confidently volunteers, crediting his English skills to the MySivi app. After the boy delivers a flawless presentation, the impressed boss downloads the app, which is promoted with a 3-day trial for 1 rupee.
